en: This requirement is triggered because you indicated your organization maintains a valid Hazardous Materials Transport License in the Germany Hazardous Materials Transport License Applicability Assessment questionnaire.
Please upload your Hazardous Materials Transport License.
Please enter the issue date of your Hazardous Materials Transport License.
The German Hazardous Materials Transport License does not have a validity period that is uniformly defined by law.
Please enter the expiration date of your Hazardous Materials Transport License.
